message:
test: improve backpressure test diagnostics and add explainability E2E

Enhance test reliability and coverage:

Tailer backpressure test:
- Capture outcomes for debugging failed assertions
- Add detailed assertion message with outcomes and metrics
- Helps diagnose intermittent failures

New explainability E2E tests:
- Test wa why --list returns all explanation templates
- Test wa why <id> returns structured explanations
- Test error codes include remediation hints
- Test policy decisions include actionable context
- Uses wa-core API directly for CI compatibility

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
